popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Susanna Brooks was born in 1610 in Netherlands. She married Ezekiel Richardson in England. They had 13 children in 13 years. She died on September 15, 1681, in Woburn, Massachusetts, at the age of 71, …

zh.lifeSummary: Susannah於1613年9月15日出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾。她於1630年2月25日與Ezekiel Richardson結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1681年9月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年68歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Susannah于1613年9月15日出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾。她于1630年2月25日与Ezekiel Richardson结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1681年9月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年68岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: Susannah was born on 15 September 1613, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England. She married Ezekiel Richardson on 25 February 1630. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 September 1681, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Susannahは1613年9月15日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた。1630年2月25日にEzekiel Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1681年9月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susannah(은)는 1613년 9월 15일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1630년 2월 25일 Ezekiel Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 9월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Susannah родилась 15 сентября 1613 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ezekiel Richardson 25 февраля 1630 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 сентября 1681 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Susannah nació el 15 de septiembre de 1613, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Ezekiel Richardson el 25 de febrero de 1630. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1681, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
